description: Prototype count-based risk thresholds for zone-level crowd monitoring. These are image-space thresholds and are not physically calibrated safety limits.

CRITICAL.meaning: Very high occupancy / prototype critical state

notes: Risk is currently based on zone_count only.
Density, temporal growth, optical flow, and anomaly scores can be added in later versions.
These thresholds should be calibrated before any real safety deployment.
